description_long: This is a tall, curvaceous plastic bottle with a white cap, designed for holding liquid lotion. The bottle is predominantly blue with a vibrant floral pattern featuring large blossoms in shades of white, pink, and yellow, and a butterfly accent. The front displays the brand 'Lowie Comfort' and the product name 'Floral Concentrat', along with a volume marking of 1.5L. The back of the bottle contains detailed product information and usage instructions in small print. The cap appears to be a screw-on type, providing a secure seal for the contents. The overall design is sleek and visually appealing, suitable for display in a household or urban environment.
description: A tall, blue plastic lotion bottle with a white screw-on cap, decorated with colorful floral graphics and product branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Lowie Comfort Floral Concentrat' branding, floral graphics, and volume marking.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the continuation of the floral pattern and a butterfly, with minimal text visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying product information, instructions, and regulatory icons in small print.
description_view_3: Right side view showing more of the floral graphics and a partial view of the product label.
